input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.3.2
            TITLE: a scatter shield must be included around the motor(s) when one or both:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.3.2: A Scatter Shield must be included around the Motor(s) when one or both:
T.5.3.2 A Scatter Shield must be included around the Motor(s) when one or both: 
• The motor casing rotates around the stator 
• The motor case is perforated

final_answer:
A Scatter Shield must be included around the Motor(s) when one or both:
* The motor casing rotates around the stator
* The motor case is perforated
